title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Declares First Quarter 2022 Dividends
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a cash dividend on the Company's Common Stock (par value $0.01 per share) for the first quarter of 2022. The Common Stock dividend is $1.59 per share and is payable April 15, 2022, to all Common Stockholders of Record as of March 31, 2022. About AvalonBay Communities, Inc. title: AvalonBay Communities Announces 2022 Annual Meeting Details
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. (NYSE: AVB) announced today that its 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held on Thursday, May 19, 2022, at 10:00 A.M. Eastern Daylight Time. Stockholders of record of the Company's Common Stock as of the close of business on March 24, 2022 are entitled to vote at and virtually attend the Annual Meeting. title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Announces 2021 Operating Results and Initial 2022 Financial Outlook
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) (the “Company”) reported today that Net Income Attributable to Common Stockholders for the three months ended December 31, 2021 was $335,209,000. This resulted in a decrease in Earnings per Share – diluted (“EPS”) for the three months ended December 31, 2021 of 1.6% to $2.40 from $2.44 for the prior year period, primarily attributable to a decrease in gain on sale of real estate and an increase in depreciation expense, as

title: The More It Drops, The More I Buy
text: REITs are dropping due to fears of rising interest rates. As a result, we're now accumulating more shares at now even greater discounts.

title: Is a Beat in Store for AvalonBay (AVB) This Earnings Season?
